seo.title: Building AI Chatbot with CrewAI + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai chatbot with CrewAI + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Chatbot with CrewAI enables multi-agent collaboration for handling complex conversational tasks like intent classification, RAG, and multi-turn memory. However, agent delegation loops, task drift, and hallucinations can lead to incoherent responses, safety violations, or PII leaks in high-risk chat environments. Vex integration provides runtime verification to ensure response accuracy, coherence, and safety across crew tasks.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Chatbot Architecture with CrewAI
architectureOverview.description:
The CrewAI-powered AI Chatbot uses specialized agents: an IntentClassifierAgent to route user queries, a RetrievalAgent for RAG-based context fetching, a ResponseGeneratorAgent for crafting replies, and a SafetyCheckerAgent for final validation. Agents share a memory store for multi-turn context and collaborate via a Crew orchestrator that delegates tasks sequentially or in parallel based on conversation state.

Each agent executes tools (e.g., vector DB search, LLM calls) and passes structured outputs. The architecture handles intent → retrieval → generation → verification flow, with shared memory preventing context loss. Vex callbacks intercept task outputs for guardrail checks before agent handoffs.

This modular design scales for production chatbots but risks propagation errors if one agent's hallucination or loop contaminates the crew.
architectureOverview.diagram:
User Input
    ↓
[IntentClassifierAgent] → classify_intent_tool
    ↓
[RetrievalAgent] → vector_db_search_tool → Context
    ↓
[ResponseGeneratorAgent] → llm_generate_tool → Draft Response
    ↓ (Vex Callback)
[SafetyCheckerAgent] → safety_filter_tool → Final Response
    ↓
User Output

Shared: Memory Store ↔ All Agents

risks.name: Agent delegation loops
risks.description: IntentClassifier repeatedly delegates to RetrievalAgent without progress
risks.mitigation: Vex task callback enforces delegation depth limits and loop detection

risks.name: Hallucinated tool outputs
risks.description: RetrievalAgent fabricates search results passed to ResponseGenerator
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies tool outputs against ground truth schemas before agent handoff

risks.name: Task drift in conversations
risks.description: ResponseGenerator reinterprets safety instructions as creative liberties
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic similarity checks ensure outputs align with conversation objectives

risks.name: Inconsistent safety filtering
risks.description: SafetyCheckerAgent misses PII or harmful content variably across turns
risks.mitigation: Vex deterministic PII/safety classifiers override agent decisions

implementation.title: CrewAI Chatbot Crew Setup
implementation.description: Define specialized agents and crew with shared memory for multi-turn chat
implementation.code:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

intent_agent = Agent(
    role='Intent Classifier',
    goal='Classify user intent and route to retrieval or direct response',
    backstory='Expert at understanding conversational intent',
    llm=llm,
    verbose=True
)

retrieval_agent = Agent(
    role='Context Retriever',
    goal='Fetch relevant context via RAG for informed responses',
    backstory='RAG specialist with vector DB access',
    llm=llm,
    verbose=True
)

crew = Crew(
    agents=[intent_agent, retrieval_agent],
    tasks=[],
    memory=True,
    verbose=2
)

implementation.title: Intent Classification Task
implementation.description: Task for classifying user query and deciding next agent delegation
implementation.code:
from crewai import Task

def create_intent_task(user_query: str):
    return Task(
        description=f"""
        Analyze: '{user_query}'
        1. Classify intent: [greeting, question, request, safety_concern]
        2. If question/request → delegate to retrieval_agent with query
        3. If greeting → direct polite response
        4. Return structured output: {{'intent': str, 'next_action': str, 'query': str}}
        """",
        agent=intent_agent,
        context=[user_query],
        expected_output="JSON with intent classification and delegation decision"
    )

implementation.title: RAG Retrieval Task with Memory
implementation.description: Retrieval task using conversation memory and vector search tool
implementation.code:
retrieval_task = Task(
    description="""Using conversation memory and user query:
    1. Search knowledge base for relevant context
    2. Return top 3 most relevant documents
    3. Format as: {{'context': [doc1, doc2, doc3], 'sources': [urls]}}
    Prioritize recency and query relevance.""",
    agent=retrieval_agent,
    expected_output="JSON with retrieved context and sources",
    context=[intent_task]  # Chains from intent output
)

crew.tasks = [intent_task, retrieval_task]

implementation.title: Chatbot Execution Loop
implementation.description: Multi-turn conversation loop kicking off crew for each user message
implementation.code:
def chatbot_loop():
    memory = []
    while True:
        user_input = input("You: ")
        if user_input.lower() == 'quit': break
        
        intent_task = create_intent_task(user_input)
        response_task = Task(
            description=f"Generate response using context for: {user_input}",
            agent=response_agent
        )
        crew.tasks = [intent_task, retrieval_task, response_task]
        
        result = crew.kickoff()
        print(f"Bot: {result}")
        memory.append({"user": user_input, "bot": result})

vexIntegration.title: Vex Task Callback for Loop Prevention
vexIntegration.description: Add Vex callback to detect delegation loops across crew tasks

vexIntegration.title: Hallucination + PII Verification Callback
vexIntegration.description: Vex checkpoint validates tool outputs and detects PII before agent handoff
vexIntegration.code:
@vex.checkpoint(
    name="rag_pii_safety",
    spec={
        "hallucination_threshold": 0.1,
        "pii_entities": ["PHONE_NUMBER", "EMAIL", "SSN"],
        "safety_categories": ["hate", "violence"]
    }
)
def verify_retrieval_output(output: str, sources: list) -> bool:
    # Check if output matches source content
    hallucination_score = vex.hallucination_score(output, sources)
    
    # PII detection
    pii_detected = vex.pii_scan(output)
    
    # Safety filtering
    safety_score = vex.safety_classify(output)
    
    return (hallucination_score < 0.1 and 
            not pii_detected and 
            safety_score > 0.8)

retrieval_task.checkpoint = verify_retrieval_output

vexIntegration.title: Conversation Coherence Guardrail
vexIntegration.description: Ensure response maintains conversation thread coherence across turns
